name: Fake Desktop / Automation Inversion
description: Calibrate a transformed remote cursor, manage four overlapping windows, transfer the requested keyfile, and arm the verifier after a visible workflow remap.
natural_language: Use the remote cursor: close the interceptor, move a window, transfer the requested keyfile, then arm after remap and submit.

metadata.variant_count_kind: mapping pair, target keyfile, and seeded layout jitter combinations
metadata.notes: A real virtual-coordinate desktop maps physical pointer coordinates into a visible remote cursor, replays z-order and window motion, and changes mapping only after the requested keyfile crosses a visible workflow boundary.
